\tzpentry{ID3666}{Phase Quantum Pressure Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3666 introduces Phase Quantum Pressure Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \text{Phase} = \begin{cases} \text{Quantum}: & Q_{\text{grav}} < \hbar c^3/G \\ \text{Semiclassical}: & \hbar c^3/G < Q_{\text{grav}} < c^5/G \\ \text{Classical}: & Q_{\text{grav}} > c^5/G \\ \text{Singular}: & Q_{\text{grav}} \to (c^5/G) \times S_{\text{BH}} \end{cases} \end{equation}
